Title: Macro Square
Problem_Statement: Define macro SQ(x) ((x)*(x)). Read n and print SQ(n).

Title: Macro Max Two
Problem_Statement: Define macro MAX(a,b). Read a b and print MAX(a,b).

Title: Macro Cube
Problem_Statement: Define macro CUBE(x) ((x)*(x)*(x)). Read n and print CUBE(n).

Title: Recursion Countdown
Problem_Statement: Read n. Using recursion, print numbers n down to 1 space separated.

Title: Recursion Sum N
Problem_Statement: Read n. Using recursion, return sum 1 to n and print.

Title: Bitwise Parity Check
Problem_Statement: Read n. Print 1 if number of set bits is odd else 0.

Title: Macro Absolute
Problem_Statement: Define macro ABS(x). Read n and print ABS(n).

Title: Enum Day Type
Problem_Statement: Read day number (1-7). Print Weekend if 6 or 7 else Weekday.

Title: Typedef Point Sum
Problem_Statement: Use typedef struct {int x; int y;} Point; Read x y and print x+y.

Title: Function Pointer Call Sim
Problem_Statement: Read a b. Using a function pointer to an add function, compute and print sum.

Title: Matrix 2x2 Trace
Problem_Statement: Read 4 integers of 2x2 matrix row-wise. Print trace (sum of diagonal).

Title: Matrix 2x2 Transpose
Problem_Statement: Read 4 integers of 2x2 matrix row-wise. Print transpose row-wise space separated.

Title: Recursive GCD
Problem_Statement: Write recursive GCD function. Read positive a b and print GCD.

Title: 2D Array Row Sums
Problem_Statement: Read 2x2 matrix (4 integers). Print sum of row 0 and row 1 space separated.

Title: 2D Array Col Sums
Problem_Statement: Read 2x2 matrix (4 integers). Print sum of col 0 and col 1 space separated.

Title: Matrix 2x2 Determinant
Problem_Statement: Read 2x2 matrix a b c d. Print determinant a*d - b*c.

Title: Dynamic Array Sum Sim
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Simulate dynamic array allocation, compute sum and print.

Title: Recursive Power
Problem_Statement: Write recursive power function. Read base exp (>=0) and print result.

Title: Bit Field Mask 4
Problem_Statement: Read integer n. Mask lower 4 bits (n & 15) and print.

Title: Union Size Sim
Problem_Statement: Assume union with int (4 bytes) and double (8 bytes). Print size of union (8).

Title: Matrix Transpose and Trace
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to transpose a matrix of order M x N and find the trace of the resultant matrix.
Read M N then M*N integers. Print transposed matrix row by row (space separated elements). Then on a new line print 'Trace: X' (if square matrix, sum of diagonal of resultant matrix; if not square, print 'Trace: Not Square').

Title: Matrix Product 2x2 Manual
Problem_Statement: Read two 2x2 matrices (4 integers each). Print resultant 2x2 matrix row by row space separated.

Title: Magic Square Check 3x3
Problem_Statement: Read 3x3 matrix (9 integers). Print Yes if all row, col, and diagonal sums are equal else No.

Title: Recursive Tower of Hanoi Moves
Problem_Statement: Read n disks. Compute total moves 2^n - 1 using recursion or formula and print.

Title: Linked List Traversal Sum Sim
Problem_Statement: Simulate linked list node sum. Read n and n node values. Print sum.

Title: Spiral Matrix Print Sim
Problem_Statement: Read 2x2 matrix (4 integers row-wise). Print spiral order (top row left-right, bottom row right-left: a b d c).
